R I G I D  A R M O R 🤝🏼 H A Y D E N ‘ S  T R D

Jus picked up my new Armory Pro swing out spare tire carrier from rigidarmor and let me tell ya… this thing is legit! I have been wanting to get my 37’ spare off the bed rack for a while now and this was the perfect solution. Holds a 37” tire noperfectly, easy to open and close (wifey does it no problem), still have easy tailgate access, has an anti-wobble hitch, new upgraded release lever, and made to add accessories as needed! We took this on our recent trip to Mammoth and it held strong and sturdy both on and offroad. If you’re looking for a solid way to carry your spare tire I highly recommend checking this one out 👌🏻 (use HDNSTRD15 @ checkout to save some 💰)

Now just need to get gg.offroad on board to get this tailgate camera relocated 😉

Big JL audio stereo with 8x 6.5 speakers, 4x marine speakers, and a full size 12” sub downfiring under the dash. All plastic interior paneling to last the life of the car.
